oskarhasabeanie website yay

portfolio

Stuff I've done:

  • A lot of games that are almost finished but I stopped working on (VR game, RPGs (atleast 5), horror game(s) etc.)

  • Created a program for youtube chat to play games

  • Youtube channel

  • A few animations (2d and 3d). Mostly unfinished.

  • An entire series which would have a game release between the third and fourth episode (safe to say I was a bit too ambitious)

What I'm working on:

  • Two games, an RPG and a horror game.

  • Decompiling Pocket Mortys.

  • Starting Chat Plays! streams again.

What I use:

  • For games:

Unity, GameMaker, Clickteam Fusion 2.5, RPG Maker MV, Sometimes Unreal Engine

  • For drawing / animating:

Adobe Animate, Paint dot NET, Aseprite, Blender, CapCut

  • For music:

Fl Studio 25, Garageband, Audacity

- The Part Where You Give Up.mp4

vr.mp4

Video of me playing the vr game I was working on with my friend. This was around 25% finished, with many bugs and just the tutorial area. There was no sound in the video so I added some tuff music. I would have had this released by now but it was on the ssd that got corrupted.
